calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction And For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with Dejuan Tartt (Successor Trustee).

Mr. Peterson stated that this is a poorly drafted Trust, that it appears to him that the Trustors (Helen and Erma) did it themselves, and that if you are able to discern the intent of the Trustors, it is what's to be followed. Mr. Peterson also stated that it is clear that they intended to create a Trust and wanted to be the first Trustees, and then the Daughter, and then Dejuan, that they wanted the property in the Trust, that it is not clear who gets the property, that they each of them only had one child and that they are not dealing with competing siblings. Mr. Tartt stated that he is in agreement with Mr. Peterson. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions and for Order Confirming Trust Asset (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instruction And For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
